prompt: Use the person in the reference image as the main subject, preserving their facial features, hairstyle, and overall vibe. Create a Japanese magazine editorial interior spread, not a cover. The layout should look like a feature article or interview page from a modern Japanese lifestyle magazine. Include one main portrait photo, several smaller lifestyle/detail photos, clean editorial typography, headline, section label, multi-column body text, captions, generous white space, and a refined grid layout. Soft natural daylight, subtle film texture, minimalist Japanese styling, calm literary atmosphere, realistic and understated.
